name: ASK Real Estate W.L.L
tagline: Bahrain's Premier Real Estate and Asset Management Firm
about: ASK Real Estate W.L.L is an award-winning, RERA-licensed real estate and asset management firm headquartered in Manama, Bahrain, with an additional office in Dubai. Founded in 2016, the firm has grown to manage over $3 billion in assets and has positioned itself not as a typical brokerage, but as a destination builder, demand activator, and market maker for the Bahrain property sector. ASK delivers integrated real estate solutions spanning brokerage, property and facility management, valuation, advisory, hospitality management, and retail leasing — all aligned to international standards including RICS and IVSC. The firm is a multiple winner of the Arabian Property Awards and generates over five million social media views annually, reflecting its standing as one of the Kingdom's most visible and trusted real estate brands.

office.full: Suite 802, 8th Floor, GFH Tower, Bahrain Harbour, Manama, Bahrain

vision: To redefine real estate services in Bahrain by setting new benchmarks in professionalism, innovation, and client-centric solutions — empowering clients through expertise, embracing technology, maintaining integrity, elevating industry standards, and integrating sustainability practices.
mission: To establish ASK Real Estate as Bahrain's leading provider of comprehensive real estate services aligned with international standards, leveraging innovation, fostering professional growth, delivering tailored solutions, and expanding market reach.

timeline.event: ASK Real Estate founded in Manama, Bahrain
RERA license awarded by the Real Estate Regulatory Authority
RICS accreditation secured, aligning services with international standards
Arabian Property Awards — Best Real Estate Agency Bahrain
Arabian Property Awards — consecutive win, Best Real Estate Agency Bahrain
$3 Billion AUM milestone; Dubai office established

team.name: Karim Yazji
team.title: Chief Executive Officer
team.bio: Visionary CEO with extensive experience in real estate investment and asset management across Bahrain, the UAE, the UK, and Africa. Manages over $3 billion in assets. Holds an MBA from SBS Swiss Business School. Serves on several real estate and investment boards and has guided ASK to multiple Arabian Property Awards wins.
